meaning: n.喀拉哈里沙漠(南部非洲沙漠高原)
examples: Unluckily, the Bushmen of the Kalahari do not have horses.
A meerkat scouting for predators in the kalahari.
Spend some time with the Bushmen of the Kalahari on this tour in Botswana by Trufflepig Travel.
The government has the support of many local environmental groups, such as the Kalahari Conservation Society.
This is home to the San people - or the Bushmen of the Kalahari.
